name: terr-miniapp-3
description: Prototype: create and use agent-native miniapps end-to-end (reuses the Terr TerrUI bridge + single-file build).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix miniapp-runtime
scripts.dev: sh -c '(cd backend && npm run start &) && (cd frontend && npm run dev)'
